STEP 1 OF 7

Welcome to the Thread Team

You're about to learn how to earn money by posting on Threads. This training will walk you through everything step by step.

READ CAREFULLY

At the end of this training, there will be a SECRET WORD. When you're ready to start, send the secret word + a brief summary of what you understood to @threadowner1 on Telegram. Without the secret word, you will NOT receive an account.

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

You'll be posting text content on Threads throughout the day. Your goal is to generate views on your pinned post. The more views your pinned post gets, the more you earn.

  • 📱 All you need is your phone
  • 📝 Text posts only — no photos needed
  • 💰 Paid $5 for every 1,000 views on your pinned post
  • 🤖 We provide accounts, content, and training
  • ⏱️ About 2 hours per day
IMPORTANT

Bans are part of the game. When you get banned, we instantly give you a new account through the Telegram bot. Don't stress about bans — just reload and keep going.

Quick check — what is your main goal?

STEP 2 OF 7

How the strategy works

Here's how you make money. It's simple but you need to understand every part.

1
You post text posts — We give you the text posts to use. These are viral captions that get views and engagement. You post them throughout the day on your account.
2
Text posts drive traffic to your profile — When people see your posts and like them, they visit your profile. On your profile, they see your pinned post.
3
Your pinned post has the link — Your pinned post is a quote of our main page's post. It contains a link to our Telegram. People click on it and message us.
4
You get paid per views on your pinned post — Every 1,000 views on your pinned post = $5. The more viral your text posts are, the more people visit your profile, the more views your pinned post gets.
KEY POINT

You are NOT paid for the views on your regular text posts. You are ONLY paid for views on your PINNED POST. But your text posts are what drive people to your pinned post. Everything works together.

Here's an example of what your text posts look like:

"bored af rn someone come save me from this loneliness 😭"
"he broke my heart and I'm still out here looking for the next one 🥺 dm me if u different"
"every guy I talk to is the same prove me wrong 😒"
"andrew tate really said women can't drive but got arrested in a toyota 💀"
REMEMBER

All text posts are provided in the Telegram bot. You don't need to come up with them yourself. Just copy and post.

What are you paid for?

STEP 3 OF 7

Creating your Pinned Post

Your pinned post is the most important post on your account. It's how you make money. Watch this video:

Here's how to create it step by step:

1
Find our Main Page — Search for our main account on Threads: mysecretpage.me
2
Go to the pinned post — You'll see a pinned post with a "CLICK TO MESSAGE" image and a link.
3
Click the repost button (two arrows) — It's the icon with two arrows 🔄 under the post.
4
Select "Quote" — Don't just repost. Choose QUOTE so you can add your own text on top.
5
Add a CTA caption — Use one of the CTA texts from the Telegram bot. Example: "bet u scared to msg me 👀👇"
6
Post it and PIN IT — After posting, tap the three dots (⋯) on your post and select "Pin to profile". This post must ALWAYS stay pinned at the top.
CTA EXAMPLES

"bet u scared to msg me 👀"
"my dms are dry save me 😭👇"
"msg me before I change my mind 😏👇"
"I reply in seconds try me 😘👇"
"u scrolled this far might as well msg me 😏👇"

EXAMPLE OF YOUR PINNED POST

Your pinned post must stay pinned at all times. If you remove it or unpin it, you won't earn anything. Every view on this post counts toward your pay.

How do you create your pinned post?

STEP 4 OF 7

Posting Text Posts

Your daily job is to post text posts throughout the day. These posts generate views and drive people to your profile where they see your pinned post.

POSTING RULES

• Post text posts only — NO photos
• All texts are in the Telegram bot
• Wait 30-40 minutes between each post
• Post throughout the day, spread it out
• Don't spam — be natural
• Aim for 10-15 posts per day

Your text posts should sound like a real young US woman. Use slang, abbreviations, and emojis naturally:

"ngl I miss having someone to fall asleep on the phone with 🥺 wbu"
"I'm done with boys I need a MAN... where are u 🥹"
"men will treat you like an option then cry when you choose yourself 😭"
"single and bored who tryna change that tonight 👀"
DON'T DO THIS

• Don't post photos — text only
• Don't post more than 1 post every 30 minutes
• Don't copy paste the same text twice
• Don't talk like a robot — be natural
• Don't put any links in your text posts

How long should you wait between each post?

STEP 5 OF 7

Doing Engagement

Besides posting, you need to engage with other content. Watch this video:

This helps the algorithm push your posts to more people.

1
Comment under US breaking news — Find posts about Trump, US politics, viral news with 20K+ likes. Drop a comment.
2
Comment under other women's posts — Find posts from models or influencers and leave a natural comment.
3
Like men's comments and reply to them — When men comment on posts, like their comment and reply. This drives them to check your profile.
4
Reply to ALL comments on your posts — Every comment you get, reply to it. This doubles your engagement.
ENGAGEMENT RULES

• 5-10 comments per day maximum — spread throughout the day
• Don't spam — keep it natural
• Talk like a young US woman with slang (ngl, fr, icl, lowkey, etc.)
• You can ask questions about the post to get men to reply
• Like a few comments here and there

Example comments:

"ngl u fine af 😭"
"omg this is so true fr 💀"
"wait this actually happened?? 👀"
"somebody explain this to me like I'm 5 😭"

How many comments should you make per day?

STEP 6 OF 7

Account Warmup

After logging into your account, you MUST warm it up before posting. Watch this video:

This is critical to avoid bans and get the algorithm working for you.

1
Log into Instagram first — Spend at least 10 minutes on Instagram. Follow some US models, like their posts, scroll through your feed.
2
Switch to Threads — Open Threads and scroll for 10 minutes. Like a few posts, zoom in on some photos.
3
Check your feed — Your feed MUST show US content (models, US news, US culture). If it doesn't, keep scrolling and engaging until it does.
4
Post a warmup text — Post something simple like "my first thread 🖤" or "gonna follow who'll react to this". Wait 1 hour.
5
Create your pinned post — Quote the main page's post and pin it to your profile.
6
Start posting text posts — You're ready to go! Start posting the text posts from the Telegram bot.
RULES TO AVOID BANS

• Use 4G, NOT WiFi
• Maximum 3 accounts per phone
• Set Instagram to PRIVATE (Threads stays public)
• Behave 100% like a real human
• To refresh your IP: turn airplane mode on and off
• Don't like too many posts at once
• Spend 10 minutes on Instagram EVERY DAY

What should you do BEFORE posting on Threads?

STEP 7 OF 7

How you get paid

You're paid weekly based on the total views on your pinned post.

PAY GRID

$5 per 1,000 views on your pinned post

Examples:
• 5K views/week = $25
• 10K views/week = $50
• 20K views/week = $100
• 50K views/week = $250

The more you post, the more views you get, the more you earn. It's that simple.

WHEN DO YOU GET PAID?

Every week. We track your stats in real time with our bot. At the end of each week, we calculate your views and pay you.

TO GET PAID YOU MUST

• Have your pinned post up at all times
• Be active and post daily
• Follow the training
• Not spam or break the rules

Final question — how much do you earn for 10,000 views on your pinned post?
